free_text: Analyzing powers of the continuum spectra-65 MeV

The AVF cyclotron at the Research

positioned at symmetric angles to the beam. Each
counter telescopes consisted of a Si detector 400 um
thick and a high purity Ge detector 15 mm thick. The
emitted particles were identified by the delta E and
The error in the target thickness is 10%.
